message:
fix(deps,db): update Cargo.lock for asupersync dual-source resolution and fix discover_messages return

- Update Cargo.lock to reflect asupersync dual-source resolution: local
  path entry (workspace member) and git rev 82cee07 (used by crates.io
  published crates like fastmcp-*) now coexist with properly disambiguated
  franken-decision/evidence/kernel sub-crate references
- Fix bare return; in discover_messages to return Ok(()) to match
  the DbResult<()> return type added in the previous commit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
